  Acerca del juego  ¡Reserva ya Forza Horizon 6 y consigue un Ferrari J50 exclusivo y pretuneado en el juego!
  Descubre los asombrosos paisajes de Japón con más de 550 coches reales y conviértete en una leyenda del automovilismo en el Festival Horizon. Comienza tu viaje como turista y explora un mundo lleno de la mejor música y cultura japonesa. Construye una propiedad en el valle, obtén increíbles casas y exhibe tu preciada colección de coches en garajes personalizables. Recorre las carreteras con tus amigos, únete a concentraciones de coches por todo Japón, da rienda suelta a tu imaginación con EventLab y construid juntos en Horizon CoLab.*
  Tu viaje para convertirte en leyenda de Horizon comienza aquí: ¡Japón te espera!
  DISFRUTA DE TOKIO, LA CIUDAD MÁS GRANDE DE HORIZON
  Te damos la bienvenida a Japón, un lugar de impresionantes contrastes entre lo rural y lo urbano donde descubrirás los secretos ocultos en el mapa más extenso de Horizon hasta la fecha, lleno de verticalidad, biomas diversos y espectaculares experiencias de conducción. Recorre los suburbios y las emblemáticas calles del centro o ponte a prueba en los muelles y distritos industriales de Tokio, la urbe más grande jamás vista en un juego de Forza Horizon y el hogar de todo fan del mundo del motor.
     
  ADÉNTRATE EN LA CULTURA AUTOMOVILÍSTICA JAPONESA
  Conduce más de 550 coches reales, como algunos clásicos del país nipón muy apreciados, con un sonido de motor de última generación y nuevas animaciones de giro con hasta 540 grados de rotación del volante. Mientras exploras Japón, reúne coches Forza Edition especiales con modificaciones extremas y encuentra modelos en el mercado de ocasión insólitos para que los pruebes y los compres. En tu camino hacia la fama, conocerás a las leyendas del Festival Horizon, participarás en batallas de Touge y vivirás auténticas historias arraigadas en la legendaria cultura automovilística de Japón.
     
  COMPITE Y DESCUBRE JAPÓN
  En Forza Horizon 6, tendrás por delante una enorme campaña de descubrimiento y un festival de carreras que podrás disfrutar en solitario o junto a tus amigos.* Comenzarás como turista y deberás demostrar que tienes lo que hay que tener para unirte al Festival Horizon como principiante, todo ello mientras descubres Japón y completas tu diario de coleccionista. Clasifícate al festival en el Evento por invitación de Horizon y ve escalando posiciones en coches cada vez más rápidos para obtener nuevas pulseras y convertirte en leyenda de Horizon. Tu nuevo estatus te permitirá acceder a la Isla Legendaria, un lugar para los mejores pilotos.
     
  CÓMETE EL MUNDO
  Durante tu viaje, irás comprando casas increíbles en Japón, cada una con garajes personalizables en los que podrás crear espacios perfectos para exhibir tu colección de coches o descargar diseños compartidos en línea con la comunidad. Desbloquea la propiedad, un valle montañoso en el que podrás construir en mundo abierto y crear prácticamente todo lo que puedas imaginar. También podrás mejorar tus coches favoritos con carrocerías, nuevas opciones aerodinámicas de Forza y acabados especiales en las ventanas.
     
  ÚNETE A LA COMUNIDAD EN MULTIJUGADOR
  Un festival siempre es más divertido con amigos.* Participa y triunfa en circuitos Contrarreloj y Retos de aceleración, o haz alarde de tus vehículos en las concentraciones de coches. Consigue nuevas maniobras de Enlace cooperando con otros jugadores, compite en campeonatos de Carreras monomarca o diviértete en los modos multijugador de Horizon que tanto te gustan, como el Eliminador y el trepidante juego del Escondite.
     
  CONSTRUID JUNTOS EN CUALQUIER LUGAR DE JAPÓN
  Construye en cualquier lugar de Japón y crea eventos personalizados con tus amigos en CoLab, la versión mejorada de EventLab, que ahora cuenta con modo multijugador* y la capacidad de construir en cualquier parte del mundo. Comparte tus obras maestras para que otros puedan jugar y disfrutar de un catálogo que siempre cuenta con nuevo contenido de la comunidad.
     
  EL FESTIVAL PARA CADA PILOTO
  Domina la carretera en nuestro juego de Horizon más accesible hasta la fecha. Entre las opciones de personalización se incluyen el modo de alto contraste granular, un radar de proximidad de coches, lenguaje de signos estadounidense y británico, o la función de conducción automática. Todo esto permite a los jugadores disfrutar de coches preciosos, la mejor música y los asombrosos escenarios del Festival Horizon.
  Descubre tu leyenda y explora los contrastes y la cultura de Japón.

  À propos du jeu  Précommandez Forza Horizon 6 dès maintenant et obtenez une Ferrari J50 préréglée exclusive dans le jeu !
  Découvrez les paysages à couper le souffle du Japon au volant de plus de 550 voitures réelles et devenez une légende du festival automobile Horizon. Simple touriste d'abord, explorez un monde foisonnant de culture japonaise et de hits musicaux. Construisez une propriété dans la vallée, achetez des maisons impressionnantes et exposez votre collection de voitures de luxe dans des garages entièrement personnalisables. Sillonnez les routes avec vos amis et participez à des rencontres automobiles à travers le Japon, ou laissez courir votre imagination grâce au labo d'épreuves et construisez ensemble avec le co-lab.*
  Partez décrocher le titre de légende d'Horizon : le Japon vous attend !
  DÉCOUVREZ TOKYO, LA PLUS GRANDE VILLE DE TOUT HORIZON
  Bienvenue au Japon, dont les contrastes saisissants entre villes et campagnes deviennent votre terrain de jeu. C'est aussi la carte la plus dense jamais créée dans Horizon, pleine de secrets à découvrir, de reliefs, de biomes variés et d'expériences de conduite spectaculaires. Parcourez les banlieues et les rues emblématiques du centre-ville ou mettez-vous à l'épreuve dans les docks et les quartiers industriels de Tokyo, la plus grande zone urbaine de tous les Forza Horizon et le paradis des amateurs d'automobile.
     
  IMMERGEZ-VOUS DANS LA CULTURE AUTOMOBILE JAPONAISE
  Pilotez plus de 550 voitures réelles, dont des japonaises de collection adulées par les fans, grâce à des sons de moteur ultraréalistes ainsi que des animations de conduite revues et corrigées, avec 540 degrés d'amplitude de rotation du volant. Tout en explorant le Japon, collectionnez des voitures spéciales Forza Edition modifiées à l'extrême et trouvez des voitures rares à tester et acheter sur le marché de l'occasion. En route vers la gloire, vous rencontrerez les légendes du festival Horizon, vous participerez à des batailles tōge et vous vivrez des histoires authentiques ancrées dans la culture automobile légendaire du Japon.
     
  LE JAPON À PORTÉE DE VOLANT
  Dans Forza Horizon 6, vous explorerez une vaste campagne de découverte et de courses Festival, jouable en solo ou en coop avec vos amis.* D'abord simple touriste, vous devrez prouver que vous êtes capable de rejoindre le festival Horizon en tant que pilote débutant, tout en découvrant le Japon et en complétant votre journal de collection. Qualifiez-vous pour le festival dans Horizon sur invitation, puis grimpez les échelons dans des voitures de plus en plus rapides et gagnez de nouveaux bracelets jusqu'à devenir une légende d'Horizon. Votre nouveau statut vous donnera accès à Legend Island, un espace exclusif réservé aux plus grands pilotes.
     
  APPROPRIEZ-VOUS LE MONDE ENTIER
  Au cours de votre aventure, vous achèterez de magnifiques maisons au Japon, chacune dotée d'un garage personnalisable afin de créer les espaces idéaux pour exposer votre collection de voitures. Vous pourrez aussi télécharger des configurations partagées en ligne par la communauté. Débloquez la propriété, une vallée montagneuse où vous pouvez construire librement dans un monde ouvert, en créant presque tout ce que vous pouvez imaginer. De même, vous pourrez améliorer vos voitures préférées avec des kits de carrosserie et de nouvelles options Forza Aero, ainsi que la possibilité de peindre des livrées personnalisées sur les vitres.
     
  REJOIGNEZ LA COMMUNAUTÉ EN MULTIJOUEUR
  Un festival, c'est toujours plus sympa entre amis.* Participez sans transition aux circuits Contre-la-montre et aux courses de drag, ou montrez vos voitures personnalisées lors des rassemblements automobiles. Gagnez de nouvelles compétences coop avec d'autres joueurs, participez aux championnats de course monotype ou lancez-vous dans des modes multijoueur Horizon toujours aussi efficaces, comme l'Éliminator et le palpitant Cache-cache.
     
  CONSTRUISEZ ENSEMBLE, PARTOUT AU JAPON
  Créez dans tout le Japon avec une liberté sans précédent, en organisant des événements personnalisés avec vos amis dans le co-lab, la version améliorée de l'outil Labo d'épreuves désormais compatible multijoueur*, qui vous permet de créer littéralement n'importe où dans le monde. Partagez vos chefs-d'œuvre pour que tout le monde puisse y jouer et découvrez un catalogue toujours renouvelé de contenus passionnants créés par la communauté.
     
  LE FESTIVAL DE TOUS LES PILOTES
  Prenez la route dans notre jeu Horizon le plus accessible à ce jour. Nos options de personnalisation comprennent le mode Contrastes granulaires élevés, le radar de proximité des voitures, la langue des signes américaine et britannique, ainsi que le pilote automatique, pour découvrir les magnifiques voitures, les musiques incontournables et les lieux spectaculaires du festival Horizon.
  Découvrez votre légende et explorez toute la richesse culturelle du Japon.

  Infos zum Spiel  Bestelle jetzt Forza Horizon 6 vor und erhalte einen bereits getunten exklusiven Ferrari J50 im Spiel!
  Entdecke die atemberaubenden Landschaften Japans am Steuer von über 550 Autos aus der echten Welt und werde auf dem Horizon-Festival zur Rennlegende. Beginne deine Reise als Tourist und erkunde eine Welt voller Hitmusik und japanischer Kultur. Errichte ein Tal-Anwesen, kaufe atemberaubende Häuser und präsentiere deine wertvolle Autosammlung in komplett individualisierbaren Garagen. Cruise mit deinen Freunden durch die Gegend und nimm an Autotreffen in ganz Japan teil, entfessle mit EventLab deine Phantasie und betätige dich kreativ mit anderen zusammen im Horizon-KoLab.*
  Dein Weg zur Horizon-Legende beginnt jetzt – Japan wartet!
  ERLEBE TOKIO, DIE BISLANG GRÖSSTE STADT IN HORIZON
  Willkommen in Japan, wo du beeindruckende Kontraste zwischen Stadt und Land erlebst, während du Geheimnisse auf einer Horizon-Karte enthüllst, die vielfältiger denn je ist und nur so vor Höhenmetern, Biomen und spektakulären Fahrerlebnissen strotzt. Cruise durch Vorstädte und legendäre Viertel der Innenstadt oder fordere dich selbst im Hafen und den Industriegebieten von Tokio heraus – dem bislang größten Stadtgebiet in einem Forza Horizon-Spiel und einer Heimat für Autoliebhaber.
     
  TAUCHE EIN IN DIE JAPANISCHE AUTOKULTUR
  Fahre über 550 Echtwelt-Autos, einschließlich heißgeliebter JDM-Klassiker, und genieße dabei realistische Motorgeräusche und aktualisierte Steuerungsanimationen mit einer Lenkraddrehung von 540°. Sammle bei deiner Erkundung Japans besondere, mit extremen Modifikationen ausgestattete Forza Edition-Autos und suche seltene Aftermarkt-Wägen, die sich testen und kaufen lassen. Auf deinem Weg zur Berühmtheit wirst du auf die Legenden des Horizon-Festivals treffen, an Touge-Rennen teilnehmen und authentische Geschichten erleben, die in Japans legendärer Autokultur verwurzelt sind.
     
  ENTDECKE JAPAN UND MACH DAS LAND ZU DEINER RENNSTRECKE
  Stürze dich in Forza Horizon 6 in eine umfangreiche Kampagne aus Erkundung und Festival-Rennen, die solo oder im Koop mit deinen Freunden spielbar ist.* Du startest als Tourist und musst beweisen, dass du das Zeug hast, als angehender Rennfahrer am Horizon-Festival teilzunehmen, während du Japan entdeckst und dein Sammel-Journal füllst. Qualifiziere dich im Horizon Invitational für das Festival, erklimme anschließend in immer schnelleren Autos die Ränge und verdiene Armbänder, um zur Horizon-Legende zu werden. Dieser Status erlaubt dir schließlich den Zugang zu Legend Island – einem exklusiven Ort für die größten Fahrer.
     
  MACH DIE GANZE WELT ZU DEINER
  Auf deiner Reise kaufst du in Japan herrliche Häuser, die über individualisierbare Garagen verfügen und dir erlauben, die idealen Orte zur Präsentation deiner Autosammlung zu schaffen. Oder lade Layouts herunter, die online von der Community geteilt werden. Schalte das Anwesen frei – ein Bergtal, in dessen offener Welt sich fast alles, was du dir vorstellen kannst, frei gestalten lässt. Und deine Lieblingsautos lassen sich mit Karosseriebausätzen und neuen Forza-Aero-Optionen verbessern und mit eigenen Lackierungen versehen.
     
  STOSSE IM MEHRSPIELER-MODUS AUF DIE COMMUNITY
  Mit Freunden ist dieses Festival immer besser.* Beteilige dich nahtlos an Zeitrennen und Drag-Treffen oder präsentiere bei Autotreffen deine individualisierten Autos. Verdiene dir neue Koop-LINK-Skills mit anderen Spielern, stell dich dem Wettbewerb in Werksrennen-Meisterschaften oder stürze dich in bekannte und beliebte Horizon-Mehrspielermodi, einschließlich Eliminator und dem hochspannenden Versteckspiel.
     
  ZUSAMMEN BAUEN, IN GANZ JAPAN
  Deiner Kreativität sind in ganz Japan keine Grenzen gesetzt, wenn du mit deinen Freunden eigene Events in KoLab entwirfst, dem verbesserten EventLab-Toolset, das jetzt Mehrspieler-Unterstützung* und die Möglichkeit bietet, buchstäblich überall in der Welt zu bauen. Teile deine Meisterwerke, damit sie jedermann spielen kann, und entdecke einen stets wachsenden Katalog aufregender neuer Inhalte, die von der Community geschaffen werden.
     
  DAS FESTIVAL FÜR JEDEN FAHRER
  Fahre einfach drauf los im bislang zugänglichsten Horizon-Spiel. Unsere Individualisierungsoptionen umfassen Hoher-Kontrast-Modus, Auto-Annäherungsradar, amerikanische und britische Gebärdensprache und Auto-Fahrt, bei der Spieler die wunderschönen Autos, Hitmusik und spektakulären Schauplätze des Horizon-Festivals erleben können.
  Entdecke deine Legende und erkunde die Kontraste und Kultur Japans.

PREMIUM EDITION      
 
 
  FORZA HORIZON 6 VERSION COMPARISON      
 
 
  Acerca do jogo  Reserva já o Forza Horizon 6 e recebe no jogo um exclusivo Ferrari J50 pré-afinado!
  Descobre as paisagens deslumbrantes do Japão em mais de 550 carros do mundo real e torna-te uma Lenda das corridas no Festival do Horizon. Começa a viagem como turista e explora um mundo cheio de músicas sensacionais e cultura japonesa. Constrói uma Propriedade no Vale, obtém casas impressionantes e expõe a tua estimada coleção de carros em Garagens totalmente personalizáveis. Junta-te aos teus amigos para passearem pelas estradas, participarem em Encontros de Automóveis por todo o Japão, darem asas à vossa imaginação no EventLab e construírem no CoLab do Horizon.*
  A tua viagem para te tornares uma Lenda do Horizon começa agora — o Japão espera por ti!
  VEM CONHECER TÓQUIO, A MAIOR CIDADE DO HORIZON DE SEMPRE
  Damos-te as boas-vindas ao Japão, um lugar que une contrastes impressionantes entre o rural e o urbano, à medida que desvendas os segredos escondidos no mapa mais denso de sempre do Horizon, cheio de verticalidade, biomas variados e experiências de condução espetaculares. Passeia pelos subúrbios e pelas ruas icónicas da baixa ou lança-te ao desafio nas docas e nos distritos industriais de Tóquio, a maior área urbana num jogo Forza Horizon e o lar dos entusiastas de carros.
     
  MERGULHA NA CULTURA AUTOMÓVEL JAPONESA
  Conduz mais de 550 carros do mundo real, incluindo alguns muito adorados clássicos do mercado japonês, com som de motor de última geração e animações de direção atualizadas com até 540 graus de rotação do volante. À medida que exploras o Japão, coleciona carros Forza Edition especiais equipados com modificações extremas e encontra carros raros do Mercado Pós-Venda para fazeres um test drive e comprares. O caminho para ter tornares célebre vai levar-te a conhecer as Lendas do Festival do Horizon, participar em Batalhas de Touge e viver histórias autênticas enraizadas na lendária cultura automóvel japonesa.
     
  DESCOBRE E COMPETE NO JAPÃO
  No Forza Horizon 6, vais explorar uma vasta campanha repleta de descobertas e corridas do Festival, na qual podes jogar a solo ou no modo cooperativo com os amigos.* Vais começar como turista e tens de provar que tens o que é preciso para te juntares ao Festival do Horizon enquanto piloto inexperiente, tudo isto enquanto andas à Descoberta do Japão e completas o teu Diário de Coleção. Qualifica-te para o Festival no Evento por Convite do Horizon, ascende na classificação com carros cada vez mais rápidos e ganha novas Pulseiras para te tornares uma Lenda do Horizon. O teu novo estatuto vai garantir-te acesso à Ilha das Lendas, um espaço exclusivo reservado aos melhores condutores.
     
  UM MUNDO INTEIRO À TUA DISPOSIÇÃO
  A tua jornada vai levar-te a comprar casas deslumbrantes no Japão, cada uma com garagens personalizáveis que te permitem criar os espaços ideais para exibires a tua coleção de carros — também podes transferir disposições partilhadas online pela comunidade. Desbloqueia a Propriedade, um vale montanhoso onde podes construir livremente no mundo aberto, criando quase tudo o que possas imaginar. Os teus carros favoritos podem ser melhorados com kits de carroçaria e novas opções do Forza Aero, bem como a capacidade de aplicar decorações personalizadas nas janelas.
     
  JUNTA-TE À COMUNIDADE NO MODO MULTIJOGADOR
  Este Festival é sempre melhor com amigos.* Participa nos Circuitos Contrarrelógio e Encontros de Drag ou exibe os teus carros personalizados em Encontros de Automóveis. Ganha novas habilidades cooperativas de LIGAÇÃO com outros jogadores, compete em Campeonatos de Corridas de Especificações ou entra nos modos Multijogador do Horizon que já conheces e adoras, como O Eliminador e o emocionante modo de Escondidas.
     
  CONSTRÓI EM CONJUNTO EM QUALQUER SÍTIO DO JAPÃO
  Cria com uma liberdade sem precedentes em qualquer sítio do Japão, construindo eventos personalizados com os amigos no CoLab, uma versão evoluída do EventLab, agora com compatibilidade com o modo multijogador* e a capacidade de poderes construir em literalmente qualquer sítio do mundo. Partilha as tuas obras de arte para que toda a gente possa jogar com elas e descobre um catálogo em constante expansão com novos conteúdos interessantes criados pela comunidade.
     
  O FESTIVAL PARA TODOS
  Faz-te à estrada aberta no nosso jogo Horizon mais acessível de sempre. As nossas opções de personalização incluem o Modo Granular de Alto Contraste, o Radar de Proximidade de Carro, a Língua Gestual britânica e americana e o Piloto Automático, que permite que os jogadores experimentem os belos carros, as músicas sensacionais e os locais espetaculares do Festival do Horizon.
  Descobre a tua Lenda e Explora os Contrastes e a Cultura do Japão.

PREMIUM EDITION      
 
 
  FORZA HORIZON 6 VERSION COMPARISON      
 
 
  ゲームについて  Forza Horizon 6 を今すぐ予約注文して、事前チューニングされた限定 Ferrari J50 をゲーム内で手に入れよう!
  実際に存在する 550 台以上のマシンに乗って美しい景色を楽しみながら、Horizon フェスティバルでレース界のレジェンドの座に上り詰めよう。観光客としてスタートし、ヒットミュージックや日本文化が詰まった世界を探索していくのだ。谷間に邸宅を建て、荘厳な不動産を所有し、カスタマイズ可能なガレージで貴重なマシンのコレクションを見せびらかそう。フレンドと一緒に日本中のカー ミートへ参加したり、イベントラボを使って Horizon コーラボで創造力を発揮することできる。*
  Horizon レジェンドへの旅が ...ここ日本で始まる! 
  Horizon 史上最大の都市、東京
  日本へようこそ。田舎と都会が織りなす鮮やかなコントラストの中で、Horizon 史上最も高密度なマップを舞台に、まだ見ぬ秘密を発見しよう。立体的な地形、多様なバイオーム、そして圧巻のドライビング体験が広がっている。郊外の道や象徴的なダウンタウンのストリートをのんびりドライブするもよし、東京の波止場や産業地区で腕試しをするもよし。Forza Horizon シリーズ史上最大の都市エリアであり、クルマを愛する者たちが集う場所が、ここにある。
     
  日本の車文化に浸り、感じよう
  最新鋭のエンジン オーディオや 最大540 度のホイール ローテーションに対応したステアリング アニメーションを備えた、大人気 JDM クラシック カーを含んだ 550 台以上の実在するマシンを走らせよう。日本探索を楽しみながら、究極の改造が施された特別な Forza Edition マシンを集め、希少なアフターマーケット車を見つけて購入してみよう。名声を得る旅を進めて行く中で、Horizon フェスティバルのレジェンドと出会ったり、峠バトルに参加したり、日本の伝説的な車文化に根ざしたリアルな物語を体験することができるぞ。
     
  日本でのレースと探検
  Forza Horizon 6 では、ソロおよび協力モードでフレンドと一緒にプレイできるフェスティバル レースや、大規模なキャンペーンで探索を進めていくことが可能だ。* まずは観光客としてスタートし、ルーキー ドライバーとして Horizon フェスティバルに出場できる腕があることを証明しながら、日本発見の旅を進めて、発見日誌のコンプリートを目指そう。Horizon 招待レースでフェスティバルへの出場権を獲得し、次第に速さを増すマシンでステップアップ。新たなリストバンドを獲得することで、Horizon レジェンドへの階段を上っていく。その称号を手にした者だけが、選ばれしドライバーのための特別なエリア「レジェンド アイランド」へと招かれるのだ。
     
  自分流のワールドを創ろう
  ゲームを進めていくごとに、カスタマイズ可能なガレージが付いてくるゴージャスな家を日本で購入する機会が巡ってくる。そのガレージがあれば、マシンのコレクションを見せびらかすことができたり、コミュニティがオンラインで共有しているレイアウトをダウンロードすることも可能だ。邸宅をアンロックすれば、オープンワールド内で自由に建設ができる山の谷間が利用可能となり、想像できるものすべてを作り上げることができるようになるぞ。お気に入りのマシンは、ボディ キットや最新の Forza Aero オプションでアップグレードをしたり、カスタムのカラーリングを窓にペイントすることも可能だ。
     
  マルチプレイヤーでコミュニティに仲間入り
  フレンドと一緒なら、フェスティバルの楽しさが倍になることは間違いなし。* タイム アタック サーキットやドラッグ ミートへシームレスに参加したり、カー ミートでカスタマイズしたマシンを見せびらかしたりしよう。新しい協力型 LINK スキルを他のプレイヤーと一緒に獲得したり、スペック レース チャンピオンシップで競い合ったり、エリミネーターやドキドキハラハラなかくれんぼを含む大人気の Horizon マルチプレイヤー モードに飛び込んだりと、楽しむ方法が満載だ。
     
  日本中で一緒にビルド
  イベントラボのアップグレード版である「コーラボ」を利用し、フレンドと一緒に日本中どこでも、これまで以上に自由にイベントを作成していこう。コーラボではマルチプレイヤー サポート* 機能が追加となり、ワールド内のどこでもビルドすることが可能だ。傑作品をみんなと共有し、コミュニティ作成の新しいコンテンツの数々を楽しんでいこう。
     
  どんなドライバーでも楽しめるフェスティバル
  シリーズ史上最も親しみやすい Horizon ゲームでドライブに出かけよう。本ゲームのカスタマイズ オプションには、細かな調整が可能なハイコントラスト モード、近接レーダー、アメリカ手話およびイギリス手話への対応、そして AutoDrive など、多彩なオプションを搭載。誰もが、美しいマシン、心を揺さぶる音楽、そして Horizon フェスティバルならではの壮大なロケーションを、自分のスタイルで楽しめる。
  自分だけのレジェンドを築き、日本が持つコントラストと文化を駆け抜けよう。

PREMIUM EDITION      
  
 
 
  FORZA HORIZON 6 VERSION COMPARISON      
 
 
  About the Game  Discover the breathtaking landscapes of Japan in over 550 real-world cars and become a racing Legend at the Horizon Festival. Start your journey as a tourist and explore a world full of hit music and Japanese culture. Build a Valley Estate, acquire awe-inspiring homes, and display your prized car collection in fully Customizable Garages. Cruise the roads with your friends and join Car Meets around Japan, unleash your imagination with EventLab and build together in Horizon CoLab.
  
  Your journey to a Horizon Legend starts now – Japan Awaits!
     
   EXPERIENCE TOKYO, HORIZON’S LARGEST EVER CITY 
  Welcome to Japan, a place where the stunning contrasts of rural and urban come together as you uncover the secrets hidden within Horizon's most dense map yet, full of verticality, diverse biomes and spectacular driving experiences. Cruise the suburbs and iconic downtown streets or challenge yourself in the docks and industrial districts of Tokyo City, the largest ever urban area in a Forza Horizon game, and the home for car enthusiasts.
     
   FEEL IMMERSED IN JAPANESE CAR CULTURE 
  Drive over 550 real-world cars, including some much loved and fan favorite JDM classics, featuring cutting-edge engine audio and updated steering animations with up to 540 degrees of wheel rotation. As you explore Japan, collect special Forza Edition cars fitted with extreme modifications and find rare Aftermarket Cars to test drive and buy. Your path to making a name for yourself will see you meet the Legends of the Horizon Festival, participate in Touge Battles, and experience authentic stories rooted in Japan’s legendary car culture.
     
   RACE AND DISCOVER IN JAPAN 
  In Forza Horizon 6, you will explore a vast campaign of discovery and Festival racing, playable solo and in co-op with your friends.* You’ll start as a tourist and must prove you’ve got what it takes to join the Horizon Festival as a rookie driver, all while you Discover Japan and complete your Collection Journal. Qualify for the Festival in the Horizon Invitational, then rise through the ranks in progressively faster cars and earn new Wristbands to become a Horizon Legend. Your newfound status will grant you access to Legend Island, an exclusive space reserved for the greatest drivers.
     
   MAKE THE WHOLE WORLD YOURS 
  Your journey will see you purchase gorgeous homes in Japan, each with customizable garages – allowing you to create the ideal spaces to showcase your car collection, or you can download layouts shared online by the community. Unlock the Estate, a mountain valley where you can build freely in the open world, creating nearly anything you can imagine. And for your favorite cars, those can be upgraded with body kits and new Forza Aero options, as well as the ability to paint custom liveries on windows.
     
   JOIN THE COMMUNITY IN MULTIPLAYER 
  This Festival is always better with your friends.* Seamlessly participate in Time Attack Circuits and Drag Meets or show off your customized cars at Car Meets. Earn new co-op LINK skills with other players, compete in Spec Racing Championships, or jump into the Horizon Multiplayer modes you know and love including The Eliminator and nailbiting Hide & Seek.
     
   BUILD TOGETHER, ANYWHERE IN JAPAN 
  Create with unprecedented freedom anywhere in Japan as you build custom events with your friends in CoLab, the upgraded EventLab toolset – now featuring multiplayer support and the ability to build literally anywhere in the world. Share your masterpieces for everyone to play and discover an always evolving catalog of exciting new content created by the community.
     
   THE FESTIVAL FOR EVERY DRIVER 
  Hit the open road in our most approachable Horizon game yet. Our customization options include Granular High Contrast Mode, Car Proximity Radar, American and British Sign Language, and AutoDrive, allowing players to experience the beautiful cars, hit music and spectacular locations of the Horizon Festival.
   
  Discover your Legend, and Explore the Contrasts and Culture of Japan.

brief:
尊享版      
 
 
  极限竞速：地平线 6 版本对比      
 
 
  关于游戏  立即预购《Forza Horizon 6》，即可在游戏内获得一辆专属预调法拉利 J50！
  驾驶超过 550 辆真实存在的车辆，探索日本的绝美风光，在地平线嘉年华成为竞速传奇。以游客身份在日本开启你的旅程，探索充满劲歌金曲与日本文化的游戏世界。建造山谷地产、购买梦幻住宅，在全面定制的车库中展示你最珍贵的车辆收藏！与好友一起上街巡游，加入日本各地的车友会，充分发挥想象游玩 EventLab，加入地平线 CoLab 与其他玩家一起建造！*
  你的地平线传奇之旅即刻开始——日本的大好山河等待你的探索！
  体验《Forza Horizon》最大的游戏世界——东京
  欢迎来到东京！在这里，乡村与城市景观有机融合，伴你在地平线有史以来密度最高的地图中探索隐藏秘密，体验精密的纵向设计，游览设计丰富的生态环境，享受绝佳驾驶体验。漫游东京，在郊区和极具标志性的市区街道尽情兜风，在码头与工业区挑战自己的驾驶技术，饱览《Forza Horizon》系列史上最大的城市区域风光，尽情畅游这座车迷家园。
     
  沉浸式体验日本浓厚的汽车文化
  驾驶超过 550 辆真实存在的车辆——其中不乏人气超高、粉丝热捧的 JDM 经典车型。车辆配备精致引擎声浪与全面更新的转向动画，更有高达 540 度的轮胎旋转图形。探索日本的过程中，你还有机会收集带有极限改装的极限竞速特别版车辆、寻获可供试驾和购买的稀有改装车辆。你将在名利双收的赛车之旅中遇到各位地平线嘉年华传奇、参与峠道赛，体验根植于日本传奇汽车文化、原汁原味的精彩故事。
     
  在日本尽情探索、疯狂竞速
  在《Forza Horizon 6》中，你将探索各种丰富的故事内容，探索日本各地，参与嘉年华竞速赛事，单独畅玩或与好友一起合作游戏。*你将作为游客踏上日本的土地，以一届新人车手的身份，证明自己拥有在地平线嘉年华大放异彩的实力。与此同时，你还能探索日本各地、完成自己的收集簿。在地平线邀请赛中获得嘉年华的参与资格、一路提升等级、获得性能逐步攀升的车辆、不断升级腕带，最终成为地平线传奇。获得这一头衔后，你还将登陆传奇岛，踏上只有顶尖车手才才有资格登上的舞台。
     
  广阔世界任你改造
  旅程中，你还可以在日本各地购买各式房屋，每一座都具有可定制车库，可供你尽情翻新，打造展示自己车辆收藏的理想空间。你也可以选择在线下载玩家社群分享的布局设计。解锁山谷地产，在开放世界中发挥创意，随心建造。也别忘了你最爱的汽车们，可以选用全新的极限竞速空气动力学选项与车身套件进行改装——还可以在车窗上使用自定义涂装哦！
     
  与玩家社群一起进行多人游戏
  嘉年华，当然要和好友一起才有滋味。*无缝加入计时赛和直线加速赛，在车友会中炫耀你的定制座驾。与其他玩家一起获得全新的合作 LINK 技术，参与规格锦标赛，或者直接加入大家熟悉的地平线多人游戏模式，参与精彩刺激的淘汰之王、捉迷藏等活动！
     
  随时随地，共享设计乐趣
  以前所未有的自由度在日本各地尽情创作，与好友在 CoLab 中一起设计定制赛事，使用全面升级的 EventLab 工具（现已加入多人游戏支持*）随时随地在游戏世界中创造。将你的杰作分享到线上供其他玩家游玩，同时也别忘了体验社区喷涌的激情创意内容。
     
  众人同乐的嘉年华
  享受系列史上最为友好的地平线游戏体验。自定义选项包括充满颗粒感的高对比度模式、车辆近距雷达、美式与英式手语以及自动驾驶功能，让玩家畅享酷炫车辆、劲爆音乐与地平线嘉年华的绝美景色。
  探索你的传奇之旅，感受日本的文化与反差。

title: 九日
description: 《九日》是一款结合道教科幻与上古神话的 2D 平台动作冒险游戏。强调格挡机制和节奏明快的战斗、配合独特的道庞克背景，刻画出别具特色的手绘世界。面对统御新昆仑的九位太阳，玩家扮演羿，只身踏上一条复仇血路。

Nine Sols is a lore rich, hand-drawn 2D action-platformer featuring Sekiro-inspired deflection focused combat, immersive storytelling, and unique Taopunk setting. Embark on a journey of Asian fantasy, explore the land once home to an ancient alien race, and follow a vengeful hero’s quest to slay the 9 Sols, formidable rulers of this forsaken realm.

In New Kunlun, hero Yi has awakened the 9 rulers of this forsaken realm. To defeat the 9 Sols in the deserted city.

“Becomes one with the way of Tao…”

New Kunlun, the Solarian’s last sanctuary, has remained quiet for centuries. Inside this vast realm, the ancient gods left mortals with a promised land that is forever protected by the sacred rituals, yet the truth of this world remains unknown to most. Everything changes when Yi, a long forgotten hero from the past, is awoken by a human child.

Follow Yi on his vengeful quest against the 9 Sols, formidable rulers of this forsaken realm, and obliterate any obstacles blocking your way in Sekiro-lite style combat. Explore in unique “Taopunk” setting that blends cyberpunk elements with Taoism and far eastern mythology. Unravel the mysteries of an ancient alien race and learn about the fate of mankind.

跟随英雄羿的脚步，在新崑崙，羿将踏上一段始于『復仇』，终于『道』的诛王之路。

新崑崙，这座由外星种族太阳人所建造的庇护所数百年间沉静如海。在这片广褒的疆域裡，神祇们为凡人留下一处被称为桃花村的应许之地，亘古以来居住于此的人们持续着古老的祭祀，神圣的仪式会庇佑其子民免于种种灾厄。很快地，又一次的祭典即将举行，村裡的人们正忙着张罗各类祭品。然而就在一切如常之时，一位被遗忘的英雄，羿，从漫长的沉睡中意外甦醒，并在道的洪流掀起巨大涟漪。

跟随羿的脚步，一起在復仇的路上前行并击败统治新崑崙的九王。探索这个道教庞克的世界解开新崑崙神秘的面纱。

brief: 《九日》是一款结合道教科幻与上古神话的 2D 平台动作冒险游戏。强调格挡机制和节奏明快的战斗、配合独特的道庞克背景，刻画出别具特色的手绘世界。面对统御新昆仑的九位太阳，玩家扮演羿，只身踏上一条复仇血路。

title: 梦幻魔法公主
description:
在这款究极美少女养成游戏里，养出世界第一可爱的女儿吧！
你是不是一直就想养个可爱又贴心的小棉袄呢？这个愿望，在这里就能实现！
本游戏中你将成为父亲，一手将年幼的爱女养大，直至她魔导学园毕业。

至于孩子怎么成长，就取决于你的育儿方针了！
• 是让她好好读书，成为学霸？
• 还是打扮得光鲜亮丽，站上舞台？
• 或是提起宝剑，驰骋沙场——
• 又或许作恶多端，成为魔王……？！
你所做的任何选择，都将极大影响女儿的未来！

游戏特征
• 自由度MAX的养成系统 — 上课、打工、约会、夜游……有时还能选择从事可疑的工作，甚至是……偷窃？！
• 海量内容 — 超过170种约会事件、50多种结局供你探索！
• 角色个性丰富 — 游戏拥有超过30位登场人物，与他们携手编织欢乐多彩的校园生活吧。
• 故事引人入胜 — 每到满月染红天际的异变“赤月之夜”，就有魔物大肆袭来。扑朔迷离之下暗含因果……一切的关键都握在女儿手中？！

一手养大全世界最最可爱的小公主！
在这款独一无二的养成游戏中，你将能体会到养育女儿的诸多乐趣，以及对她的深深挂念。

title: 吸血鬼爬行者：屠戮地牢的吸血鬼幸存者
description:
黑暗的世界中，新的冒险开始了。探索地图，升级力量，击杀怪物，寻找宝藏。
轻度Rogue、回合制、卡牌……来自（意外）三次获得BAFTA奖项的《Vampire Survivors》开发者全新打造了《Vampire Crawlers: The Turbo Wildcard from Vampire Survivors》，将Survivors的爽快玩法融入了这款超上头的地下城探索新作。构筑绝杀牌组，从新的视角探索熟悉的地下城，释放毁天灭地的连击。要么稳扎稳打、运筹帷幄，要么以最快速度结束回合：结果总是准确的，毕竟我们说它“超上头”不是没有原因的！

游戏内容

滚雪球般的回合制杀戮：按照法力从小到大的顺序出牌连击，每一手牌都结合下一张卡牌的效果倍增。使用万能牌不断叠加至10、20、30……你能一直叠到无穷大吗？

跟随自己的节奏：要么稳扎稳打、运筹帷幄，要么以最快速度结束回合：结果总是准确的，毕竟我们说它“超上头”不是没有原因的！

牌组构筑：积累经验升级以解锁新的卡牌，撞开宝箱获得自定义宝石和强化，进化武器并召唤幸存者来触发连锁反应，自可立于不败之地。

地下城探索：多层的地下城中遍布《Vampire Survivors》中罕见的功能墙，还有各类独特的宝藏和交互元素。找到铲子挖入下一层，没准就挖中了！

title: 塞尔达传说 旷野之息
description:
《塞尔达传说 荒野之息》（日语：ゼルダの伝説 ブレス オブ ザ ワイルド，英语：The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild，港台译作“萨尔达传说 荒野之息”）是一款动作冒险游戏。本作由任天堂企划制作本部与任天堂旗下子公司Monolith Soft协力开发。游戏最早计划为Wii U平台独占发行，之后宣布将在任天堂新的混合型游戏主机任天堂Switch上发售，并将成为该主机的首发游戏之一。同时任天堂确认本作会是任天堂在Wii U上开发的最后一款游戏。
游戏最初于2013年公布，并计划于2015年发行。之后任天堂宣布游戏延期并最终定于2017年3月3日发行。
剧情
很久很久以前，海拉尔王国的各个族群和平共存。其中名为锡克族（Sheikah）的族人们制造了许多先进的科技来帮助海拉尔的人们。但是有一天，邪恶的梦魇加侬（Calamity Ganon）击败了勇者并试图占领海拉尔王国。情势紧迫下锡克族人启动了他们暗中制造、用来保护家园的机械巨兽和守卫者。这些机械士兵成功的将梦魇加侬封印在海拉尔城堡中，但是机械士兵们却遭到邪恶力量的控制而反过来攻击海拉尔人。因为惧怕著锡克族的力量，海拉尔王将他们统统放逐出海拉尔王国。
一百年后的现代，勇者林克从沉睡中苏醒，却失去了所有的记忆。林克在一个未知的女性声音的带领下遇见了一位长者，长者告诉他梦魇加侬依旧被封印在城堡内并日渐壮大自己的力量，林克必须在封印被破坏前拯救海拉尔王国。


《塞尔达传说 荒野之息》获得业界极高的好评。国外多家游戏媒体给予满分评价。

《塞尔达传说 荒野之息》获得业界极高的好评。国外多家游戏媒体给予满分评价。

Esqueça tudo que você sabe sobre os jogos da série The Legend of Zelda. Entre em um mundo de descobertas, exploração e aventura em The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild, o novo jogo da famosa série que veio para romper barreiras. Viaje pelos vastos campos, florestas e montanhas enquanto descobre o que aconteceu com o reino de Hyrule nesta deslumbrante aventura a céu aberto.

Forget everything you know about The Legend of Zelda games. Step into a world of discovery, exploration, and adventure in The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild, a boundary-breaking new game in the acclaimed series. Travel across vast fields, through forests, and to mountain peaks as you discover what has become of the kingdom of Hyrule in this stunning Open-Air Adventure.

title: 我的世界
description: 探索随机生成的世界，建造从最简单的住宅到最宏伟的城堡等一切不可思议之物。您可以在创造模式中享用无限资源，也可以在生存模式中挖掘整个世界，合成武器和盔甲，抵御各种危险生物。攀登崎岖的群山，探明复杂的洞穴，挖掘大型矿脉。探索错综的洞穴与石笋洞穴生物群系。用蜡烛照亮世界，展示出自己作为知识渊博的地下冒险者和登山大师的风采！

在携带版(即PE版)的1.2"独乐乐不如众乐乐"更新之后统一了许多不同的平台(包括手机端,win10端等)，原本的称呼不再适合，于是便以其源代码数据库的内部名称"基岩"命名这个版本。从此之后所有携带版、win10版、树莓派等原来单独更新的版本统称为“基岩版”并统一更新。

Minecraft focuses on allowing the player to explore, interact with, and modify a dynamically generated map made of one-cubic-meter-sized blocks. In addition to blocks, the environment features plants, mobs, and items. Some activities in the game include mining for ore, fighting hostile mobs, and crafting new blocks and tools by gathering various resources found in the game. The game's open-ended model allows players to create structures, creations, and artwork on various multiplayer servers or their single-player maps. Other features include redstone circuits for logic computations and remote actions, minecarts and tracks, and a mysterious underworld called the Nether. A designated but completely optional goal of the game is to travel to a dimension called the End, and defeat the ender dragon.

Minecraft: Java Edition (previously known as Minecraft) is the original version of Minecraft, developed by Mojang Studios for Windows, macOS, and Linux. Notch began development on May 10, 2009, publicly releasing Minecraft on May 17, 2009. The full release of the game was on November 18, 2011, at MINECON 2011.

title: 纸房子
description: 这是一部以中式校园为背景的视觉小说。离开的好友、模糊的恋情、纷乱的人际关系，以及不那么美满的家庭，是青春期的忧郁还是令人难以承受的痛苦？您将以主角赵颖的视角去体验她的高中生活，帮她做出选择，看见所有可能。

localized_description.text: America, 1899. The end of the Wild West era has begun. After a robbery goes badly wrong in the western town of Blackwater, Arthur Morgan and the Van der Linde gang are forced to flee. With federal agents and the best bounty hunters in the nation massing on their heels, the gang must rob, steal and fight their way across the rugged heartland of America in order to survive. As deepening internal divisions threaten to tear the gang apart, Arthur must make a choice between his own ideals and loyalty to the gang who raised him.

Red Dead Redemption 2 is the epic tale of outlaw Arthur Morgan and the infamous Van der Linde gang, on the run across America at the dawn of the modern age.

America, 1899. The end of the wild west era has begun as lawmen hunt down the last remaining outlaw gangs. Those who will not surrender or succumb are killed.

After a robbery goes badly wrong in the western town of Blackwater, Arthur Morgan and the Van der Linde gang are forced to flee. With federal agents and the best bounty hunters in the nation massing on their heels, the gang must rob, steal and fight their way across the rugged heartland of America in order to survive. As deepening internal divisions threaten to tear the gang apart, Arthur must make a choice between his own ideals and loyalty to the gang who raised him.

title: 灵视异闻 FILE23 本所七大不可思议
description:
由SQUARE ENIX献上的正宗恐怖冒险解谜游戏

《灵视异闻 FILE23 本所七大不可思议》

真实存在的怪谈──“本所七大不可思议”，
为了实现“复活秘术”，一连串“互相诅咒”事件即将展开

本作是以昭和后期的日本墨田区为舞台的恐怖冒险游戏。
个性独特的角色们纷纷受到诅咒，
剧情在他们的目的与企图相互影响下一步步发展，最终将由你亲自让故事迎接结局。

平凡的上班族兴家彰吾和朋友福永叶子，一起在半夜来到锦糸堀公园，调查当地的知名怪谈“本所七大不可思议”。
叶子告诉兴家这个怪谈和“复活秘术”有关，但兴家不太相信而没有将她的话放在心上，结果他却接二连三地目睹怪事发生……
同一时间，还有其他人也在追查“本所七大不可思议”。
侦办连续发生的离奇死亡事故的刑警、试图厘清同班同学自杀真相的女高中生，以及发誓要替已离世的儿子复仇的母亲。
以“本所七大不可思议”为中心，他们的目的与企图彼此牵连，导致故事一步步迈向“互相诅咒”的悲剧。

◆360度全景背景，仿佛真的身处于昭和时期的日本
　在墨田区的观光课、乡土资料馆、观光协会和商工会等单位的大力协助之下，以360度全景照相机拍摄的“360度全景背景”将呈现最真实的街道风景。

◆被诅咒的角色们展开令人屏息凝气的心理战

◆由你亲手揭开令人感到冲击的真相

How far would you go to bring someone back from the dead? Discover the depths that some will go to in this horror-adventure game.

Set in Honjo, Tokyo's Sumida ward during the Showa period (1926-89), this is the unsettling tale of those with the power to curse, derived from the gruesome real world urban legends: "The Seven Mysteries of Honjo."

Follow the cursed seven as they embark on a supernatural ordeal over a three-day period to realise their desperate hopes and dreams.

Shogo Okiie, an ordinary office worker, visits Kinshibori Park in the dead of night with his friend, Yoko Fukunaga, to investigate a well-known local ghost story: The Seven Mysteries of Honjo. Shogo doesn’t quite believe Yoko when she talks about how the Mysteries are connected to the Rite of Resurrection and doesn't pay it much mind - that is, until strange events begin to unfold before his very eyes.

Meanwhile, several others are making their own investigations into The Seven Mysteries...
Detectives investigating a series of strange deaths, a high-school girl seeking the truth behind her classmate’s suicide, and a mother who has sworn revenge for her lost son.

Their desires and motives intertwine and interplay, with the Seven Mysteries of Honjo at the core, leading the story towards a battle of wits and curses.

title: 塞尔达传说 王国之泪
description: 《塞尔达传说 王国之泪》（日语：ゼルダの伝説 ティアーズ オブ ザ キングダム，英语：The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom）是一款由任天堂企划制作本部开发并由任天堂发行在任天堂Switch上的开放世界动作冒险游戏。本作于2019年E3直面会上正式公布，于2023年5月12日发售，发售后获得业界高度好评，多家媒体给予满分评价。

无尽的冒险，扩张至无垠的天空。《塞尔达传说 旷野之息》续篇登场。

广阔无垠的“大地”，接下来更扩张至浮云之上的“天空”——在这个世界里，所往之处、所做之事，一切皆由自己作主。要在空中穿梭翱翔，或是在不可思议的空岛进行探索？还是要运用林克手中的全新力量，迎战海拉鲁的异变？专属于你的无尽冒险，再度启程。

title: 画中世界
description: Gorogoa is a puzzle video game in development by Jason Roberts for Microsoft Windows, Mac OS, iOS, and Android. The Windows and Mac versions will be released in 2014 with the mobile version some time after.

localized_description.text: Gorogoa is a puzzle video game in development by Jason Roberts for Microsoft Windows, Mac OS, iOS, and Android. The Windows and Mac versions will be released in 2014 with the mobile version some time after.

Still a work in progress, Gorogoa is a lovingly hand-illustrated world suspended inside of a unique puzzle. To solve the puzzle, the player rearranges a few tiles on a simple grid, placing them next to or on top of one another. But each tile is also a window into a different part of the game world--or perhaps into a different world--and each window plays like its own little game. Even so, the key to progressing never lies within one tile, but in the connections between tiles.
The game is tentatively targeted for release in early / mid 2014, initially on PC and Mac, subsequently on mobile platforms.

这是一款非常独特的益智游戏，灵感来源于纸牌魔术和互动漫画。游戏的画面被分割成四块，每个区域都会展现出一副场景供玩家进行探索。玩家通过缩放区域来寻找相似的场景，并且把这些场景进行拼接或者镶嵌组合，如果成功，原本静止的画面就会变成一幕动画。制作人表示，“游戏中每张插画构成一个独立的小世界，玩家可以更改其中的层次或者排列分布，这最终也将改变游戏进程”。

Gorogoa is a beautiful hand-drawn story suspended inside a completely unique puzzle. Arrange and combine lavishly illustrated panels, each one a separate interactive window into a living game world.

Gorogoa isn't just a game - it's a work of art, expressing itself through soulful, charming illustrations and distinguished puzzle mechanics.

Winner of Debut Game at the 2018 BAFTA Games Awards, as well as Best Mobile Game and the Innovation Award at the GDC 2018 Choice Awards,   Gorogoa   is an elegant evolution of the puzzle genre, told through a beautifully hand-drawn story designed and illustrated by Jason Roberts.
 
       
 
  UNIQUELY IMAGINATIVE PUZZLES 
 The gameplay of  Gorogoa  is wholly original, comprised of lavishly illustrated panels that players arrange and combine in imaginative ways to solve puzzles. Impeccably simple, yet satisfyingly complex.
 
       
 
  GORGEOUSLY HAND-DRAWN GAMEPLAY 
 Jason Roberts created thousands of meticulously detailed hand-drawn illustrations, encompassing the impressive scope of  Gorogoa's  personal narrative.
 
       
 
  A NEW KIND OF STORYTELLING 
  Gorogoa  isn't just a game - it's a work of art, expressing itself through soulful, charming illustrations and distinguished puzzle mechanics.

Gorogoa   es una atractiva evolución del género de puzle narrada a través de una preciosa historia dibujada a mano, diseñada y ilustrada por Jason Roberts.
 
       
 
  PUZLES ÚNICOS LLENOS DE IMAGINACIÓN 
 La nota que caracteriza la dinámica de  Gorogoa  es la originalidad. Presenta unos paneles con espléndidas ilustraciones que los jugadores deben organizar y combinar, utilizando su imaginación para resolver puzles. Una sencillez elegante y una complejidad de lo más gratificante.
 
       
 
  PRECIOSA DINÁMICA DE JUEGO DIBUJADA A MANO 
 Jason Roberts ha dibujado a mano miles de ilustraciones con gran nivel de detalle, que acompañan al impresionante escenario de la narrativa personal de  Gorogoa .
    [/img]

[b]UNA NUEVA MANERA DE CONTAR HISTORIAS[/b]
[i]Gorogoa[/i] no es solo un juego: es una obra de arte que se expresa a través de ilustraciones cautivadoras y conmovedoras, y de una exquisita mecánica de puzles.

  UNA NUEVA MANERA DE CONTAR HISTORIAS 
  Gorogoa  no es solo un juego: es una obra de arte que se expresa a través de ilustraciones cautivadoras y conmovedoras, y de una exquisita mecánica de puzles.

Gorogoa   est une évolution élégante du genre puzzle, accompagnée d’une histoire joliment dessinée à la main, conçue et illustrée par Jason Roberts.
  
       
 
  DES PUZZLES INVENTIFS ET UNIQUES 
 On joue à  Gorogoa  de façon totalement originale, avec des panneaux somptueusement illustrés, que le joueur peut organiser et associer au gré de son imagination afin de résoudre des énigmes. C’est superbement simple et pourtant agréablement complexe.
 
       
 
  UNE HISTOIRE SUBLIME DESSINÉE À LA MAIN 
 Jason Roberts a dessiné à la main des milliers d’illustrations bourrées de détails méticuleux, dans lesquelles se fond l’impressionnante étendue de la narration toute personnelle de  Gorogoa .
 
       
 
  UN NOUVEAU GENRE DE NARRATION 
  Gorogoa  est plus qu’un jeu : c’est une œuvre d’art, qui s’exprime par le biais d’illustrations attendrissantes et charmantes et grâce à une brillante mécanique de puzzles.

Gorogoa   ist eine elegante Evolution des Rätsel-Genres und wird in Form einer wunderschön handgezeichneten Geschichte erzählt, die von Jason Roberts gestaltet und illustriert wurde.
 
       
  
  EINZIGARTIG PHANTASIEVOLLE RÄTSEL 
 Der Spielablauf von  Gorogoa  ist völlig neuartig und besteht aus aufwendig illustrierten Paneelen, die vom Spieler auf kreative Weise arrangiert und kombiniert werden, um Rätsel zu lösen. Unglaublich einfach und doch wunderbar komplex.
 
       
 
  WUNDERSCHÖNE HANDGEZEICHNETE SZENEN 
 Jason Roberts hat für die ganz persönliche und beeindruckende Erzählung von  Gorogoa  von Hand Tausende akribisch detaillierter Zeichnungen erstellt.
 
       
 
  EINE NEUE ART DES ERZÄHLENS 
  Gorogoa  ist mehr als nur ein Spiel. Es ist ein Kunstwerk, das in gefühlvollen, bezaubernden Illustrationen und hervorragenden Rätseln zum Leben erweckt wird.

Winner of Debut Game at the 2018 BAFTA Games Awards, as well as Best Mobile Game and the Innovation Award at the GDC 2018 Choice Awards,   Gorogoa   is an elegant evolution of the puzzle genre, told through a beautifully hand-drawn story designed and illustrated by Jason Roberts.
 
       
 
  UNIQUELY IMAGINATIVE PUZZLES 
 The gameplay of  Gorogoa  is wholly original, comprised of lavishly illustrated panels that players arrange and combine in imaginative ways to solve puzzles. Impeccably simple, yet satisfyingly complex.
 
       
 
  GORGEOUSLY HAND-DRAWN GAMEPLAY 
 Jason Roberts created thousands of meticulously detailed hand-drawn illustrations, encompassing the impressive scope of  Gorogoa's  personal narrative.
 
       
 
  A NEW KIND OF STORYTELLING 
  Gorogoa  isn't just a game - it's a work of art, expressing itself through soulful, charming illustrations and distinguished puzzle mechanics.

Winner of Debut Game at the 2018 BAFTA Games Awards, as well as Best Mobile Game and the Innovation Award at the GDC 2018 Choice Awards,   Gorogoa   is an elegant evolution of the puzzle genre, told through a beautifully hand-drawn story designed and illustrated by Jason Roberts.
 
       
 
  UNIQUELY IMAGINATIVE PUZZLES 
 The gameplay of  Gorogoa  is wholly original, comprised of lavishly illustrated panels that players arrange and combine in imaginative ways to solve puzzles. Impeccably simple, yet satisfyingly complex.
 
       
 
  GORGEOUSLY HAND-DRAWN GAMEPLAY 
 Jason Roberts created thousands of meticulously detailed hand-drawn illustrations, encompassing the impressive scope of  Gorogoa's  personal narrative.
 
       
 
  A NEW KIND OF STORYTELLING 
  Gorogoa  isn't just a game - it's a work of art, expressing itself through soulful, charming illustrations and distinguished puzzle mechanics.

Gorogoa   è un’elegante evoluzione del genere rompicapo che viene raccontata attraverso una storia splendidamente disegnata a mano, ideata e illustrata da Jason Roberts.
  
       
 
  ROMPICAPI UNICI E PIENI DI IMMAGINAZIONE 
 Il modo con cui si gioca a  Gorogoa  è completamente originale, con pannelli pieni di illustrazioni che i giocatori devono sistemare e combinare lasciando spazio alla fantasia per risolvere i rompicapi. Di una semplicità impeccabile, eppure di una complessità travolgente.
 
       
 
  GIOCO SPLENDIDAMENTE DISEGNATO A MANO  
 Jason Roberts ha meticolosamente disegnato a mano migliaia di dettagliate illustrazioni, riuscendo ad inglobare anche l’incredibile portata della narrativa personale di  Gorogoa .
 
       
 
  UN NUOVO TIPO DI NARRAZIONE 
  Gorogoa  non è solamente un videogioco: è un’opera d’arte che si esprime per mezzo di illustrazioni espressive e incantevoli, nonché con le raffinate meccaniche dei rompicapi.

brief: Gorogoa is a puzzle video game in development by Jason Roberts for Microsoft Windows, Mac OS, iOS, and Android. The Windows and Mac versions will be released in 2014 with the mobile version some time after.

title: 最终幻想7 重制版
description:
《最终幻想7：重制版》真的来了，不再是单纯的移植，而是真真正正的重制版，“remake”，在2015年E3的索尼发布会上，《最终幻想7：重制版》登陆PS4！高清克劳德，你还在等什么？
      《最终幻想VII重制版》与原版画风设计不同，该游戏会跟《最终幻想7：圣子降临》或者《最终幻想：纷争》的风格类似，同时克劳德将会采用更加现代的造型。

localized_description.text:
睽違10年的系列最新作品《Tomodachi Life 朋友收集 夢想生活》將於Nintendo Switch登場。

漂浮於汪洋的島嶼上，可以看見Mii們生活的身影……這次又會展開什麼樣的人生戲碼呢？敬請期待後續進一步資訊。
睽違10年的系列最新作品《Tomodachi Life 朋友收集 夢想生活》將於Nintendo Switch登場。
Populate your island with Mii characters—and find out what happens when they all live there together! Create Mii™ characters based on family, friends, or your own original ideas—there are plenty...

Create Mii characters based on family and friends, someone you admire, or something completely original—there are plenty of personality traits, little quirks, and physical traits to choose from—including some face customization options you haven’t seen before! Go deep into getting every detail just right, or create Miis quickly and easily by answering some simple questions, and then help them explore their likes and dislikes, find relationships, and get up to all sorts of fun. Your Miis are bound to surprise you as they take on a life of their own!

title: 请输入帮助
description:
A puzzle-mystery game inspired by Return of the Obra Dinn, Her Story, Unheard and The Roottrees are Dead.
Investigate the files on an old computer that once belonged to a mysterious outside agent.
The files detail the gruesome story of Galley House, a case that was said to be unsolvable.
What really happened at Galley House? And what did the agent find out that lead to their death?
Delve through deeper and deeper layers of mystery as you piece together the grand puzzle.
And remember... There are no ghosts in Galley House!

title: 艾尔登法环 Elden Ring
description:
艾尔登法环是以正统黑暗奇幻世界为舞台的动作RPG游戏。 走进辽阔的场景与地下迷宫探索未知，挑战困难重重的险境，享受克服困境时的成就感吧。 不仅如此，登场角色之间的利害关系谱成的群像剧，更是不容错过。

・充满刺激的辽阔世界
无缝连接的辽阔世界──尽情探索状况多变的开放场景，构造复杂、立体的巨大地下迷宫。
在探索新发现时感到欣喜，在征服强敌时感到成就感十足，丰富内容等你体会。

・专属于你的角色
不只能自订操纵角色的外表，更能自行搭配武器、装备，与魔法──
想成为力量取胜的顽强战士，或选择在魔法领域登峰造极，都能照自己的游玩风格决定。

・源自神话的群像剧
片段破碎，却又多彩的故事──以“交界地”为舞台登场的角色们各有主张，
于是在利害关系之下谱成的群像剧，就此展开。

・与其他玩家维持非即时连系的独特系统
除了能与其他玩家一同游玩的多人联机游玩以外，
本游戏也有非即时联机系统，能借此得知其他玩家的存在。

《艾尔登法环》是以正统黑暗奇幻世界为舞台的动作RPG游戏。 走进辽阔的场景与地下迷宫探索未知，挑战困难重重的险境，享受克服困境时的成就感吧。

== 游戏特色 ==
・充满刺激的辽阔世界
无缝连接的辽阔世界──尽情探索状况多变的开放场景，构造复杂、立体的巨大地下迷宫。
在探索新发现时感到欣喜，在征服强敌时感到成就感十足，丰富内容等你体会。

・专属于你的角色
不只能自订操纵角色的外表，更能自行搭配武器、装备，与魔法──
想成为力量取胜的顽强战士，或选择在魔法领域登峰造极，都能照自己的游玩风格决定。

・源自神话的群像剧
片段破碎，却又多彩的故事──以“交界地”为舞台登场的角色们各有主张，
于是在利害关系之下谱成的群像剧，就此展开。

・与其他玩家维持非即时连系的独特系统
除了能与其他玩家一同游玩的多人联机游玩以外，
本游戏也有非即时联机系统，能借此得知其他玩家的存在。

== 世界观 ==
黄金树的根源——艾尔登法环在拥戴永恒女王玛莉卡的交界地破碎了。

继承玛莉卡之血的孩子“半神们”手持艾尔登法环的碎片——大卢恩，
因其力量而发狂，扭曲，引发了破碎战争……
被无上意志所抛弃。

其后，赐福的指引来到了曾经双眸失去黄金赐福，被驱赶至交界地的褪色者身边。
失去赐福，无法瞑目的死者们啊。
遵循指引，前往雾之海那端的交界地，
觐见艾尔登法环吧。

然后，成为艾尔登之王吧。

ELDEN RING Shadow of the Erdtree Edition   
 ELDEN RING Shadow of the Erdtree Edition includes:
   ELDEN RING
   ELDEN RING Shadow of the Erdtree expansion  
 
  ELDEN RING Shadow of the Erdtree Deluxe Edition   
 ELDEN RING Shadow of the Erdtree Deluxe Edition includes:

   ELDEN RING Shadow of the Erdtree expansion
   ELDEN RING Digital Artbook & Original Soundtrack
   ELDEN RING Shadow of the Erdtree Artbook & Soundtrack  
 
  About the Game  THE CRITICALLY ACCLAIMED FANTASY ACTION RPG 
  Rise, Tarnished, and be guided by grace to brandish the power of the Elden Ring.  • A Breathtaking World Full of Excitement and Mystery The Lands Between are part of a vast continent where magnificent open fields and huge dungeons with complex and three-dimensional designs are seamlessly connected. As you explore, the joy of discovering unknown and overwhelming threats awaits you.
 Mastery of the terrain and knowledge of its secrets can help you overcome enemies and defeat formidable bosses or lead invading players into traps.
 
   • Defeat Challenging Foes in Intense Combat Combat in ELDEN RING is simple to learn yet offers hidden depths of mastery. As you seek to become the Elden Lord, you’ll need to explore the balance between attacking and avoiding damage, use a wide variety of weapons, spells, & summons, and perfect your timing to take advantage of your opponents’ weaknesses.
 
   • Create and Build Your Own Character In addition to customizing the appearance of your character, there are countless ways to combine the weapons, armor, usable items, and magic that you equip. You can develop your character according to your play style.
 No matter if you prefer bold physical confrontation, tactical spellcasting, or the subtle art of stealth, you’ll be able to find gear that supports your choices.
 
   • An Epic Drama Born from a Myth Created by George R.R. Martin The founding mythology of Elden Ring was written by George R. R. Martin and adapted into a rich multilayered story. Intersecting goals and desires between the characters create an intense narrative that weaves throughout the Lands Between. The events of the game can unravel in many ways, depending on your interventions.
 
   • Play Alongside a Massive Worldwide Community The Tarnished community is massive and active. Your friends may already be among them. You can play with up to two other Tarnished as your cooperative teammates, either by inviting them using a shared password or by summoning them from a pool of nearby community members.
 There are also ample opportunities to face off against other players, either through co-op invasions, invited duels, or the many player battle options available in the three Colosseums.

  About the Game  THE CRITICALLY ACCLAIMED FANTASY ACTION RPG 
  Rise, Tarnished, and be guided by grace to brandish the power of the Elden Ring.  • A Breathtaking World Full of Excitement and Mystery The Lands Between are part of a vast continent where magnificent open fields and huge dungeons with complex and three-dimensional designs are seamlessly connected. As you explore, the joy of discovering unknown and overwhelming threats awaits you.
 Mastery of the terrain and knowledge of its secrets can help you overcome enemies and defeat formidable bosses or lead invading players into traps.
 
   • Defeat Challenging Foes in Intense Combat Combat in ELDEN RING is simple to learn yet offers hidden depths of mastery. As you seek to become the Elden Lord, you’ll need to explore the balance between attacking and avoiding damage, use a wide variety of weapons, spells, & summons, and perfect your timing to take advantage of your opponents’ weaknesses.
 
   • Create and Build Your Own Character In addition to customizing the appearance of your character, there are countless ways to combine the weapons, armor, usable items, and magic that you equip. You can develop your character according to your play style.
 No matter if you prefer bold physical confrontation, tactical spellcasting, or the subtle art of stealth, you’ll be able to find gear that supports your choices.
 
   • An Epic Drama Born from a Myth Created by George R.R. Martin The founding mythology of Elden Ring was written by George R. R. Martin and adapted into a rich multilayered story. Intersecting goals and desires between the characters create an intense narrative that weaves throughout the Lands Between. The events of the game can unravel in many ways, depending on your interventions.
 
   • Play Alongside a Massive Worldwide Community The Tarnished community is massive and active. Your friends may already be among them. You can play with up to two other Tarnished as your cooperative teammates, either by inviting them using a shared password or by summoning them from a pool of nearby community members.
 There are also ample opportunities to face off against other players, either through co-op invasions, invited duels, or the many player battle options available in the three Colosseums.

2022年のテレビゲーム

Elden Ring is an action RPG developed by FromSoftware and published by Bandai Namco Entertainment, released in February 2022. Directed by Hidetaka Miyazaki, with world-building contributions from novelist George R. R. Martin, the game features an expansive open world called the Lands Between. Players assume the role of a customisable character known as the Tarnished, who must explore this world, battle formidable enemies, and seek to restore the Elden Ring to become the Elden Lord.

The game builds on the challenging gameplay mechanics familiar from the Dark Souls series but introduces a more open-ended structure with vast exploration, dynamic weather, and a day-night cycle. It offers deep lore, complex characters, and an interconnected world filled with secrets, dungeons, and powerful bosses.

Elden Ring takes place in the Lands Between, a fictional realm over which several demigods rule. It was previously ruled over by the immortal Queen Marika, who acted as keeper of the Elden Ring, a powerful force that manifested itself as the physical concept of order. When Marika shattered the Elden Ring and disappeared, her demigod children began fighting over pieces of the Ring in an event called The Shattering. Each demigod has a shard of the Ring called a Great Rune, which corrupts them with power. In the game, the player character is a Tarnished, one of a group of exiles from the Lands Between who are summoned back after the Shattering. The player must traverse the realm to repair the Elden Ring and become the Elden Lord.

brief:
艾尔登法环是以正统黑暗奇幻世界为舞台的动作RPG游戏。 走进辽阔的场景与地下迷宫探索未知，挑战困难重重的险境，享受克服困境时的成就感吧。 不仅如此，登场角色之间的利害关系谱成的群像剧，更是不容错过。

・充满刺激的辽阔世界
无缝连接的辽阔世界──尽情探索状况多变的开放场景，构造复杂、立体的巨大地下迷宫。
在探索新发现时感到欣喜，在征服强敌时感到成就感十足，丰富内容等你体会。

・专属于你的角色
不只能自订操纵角色的外表，更能自行搭配武器、装备，与魔法──
想成为力量取胜的顽强战士，或选择在魔法领域登峰造极，都能照自己的游玩风格决定。

・源自神话的群像剧
片段破碎，却又多彩的故事──以“交界地”为舞台登场的角色们各有主张，
于是在利害关系之下谱成的群像剧，就此展开。

・与其他玩家维持非即时连系的独特系统
除了能与其他玩家一同游玩的多人联机游玩以外，
本游戏也有非即时联机系统，能借此得知其他玩家的存在。

title: 博德之门3
description: 召集你的团队，回到被遗忘的国度，开启一段记载着友谊与背叛、牺牲与生存、以及至上力量诱惑的传奇故事。

localized_description.text: 召集你的团队，回到被遗忘的国度，开启一段记载着友谊与背叛、牺牲与生存、以及至上力量诱惑的传奇故事。

拉瑞安工作室自豪地宣布，正基于PC和Google Stadia平台进行《博德之门3》的开发和发行工作，并与威世智的龙与地下城团队进行紧密合作。源起于目前D&D独有的机制规则与法术体系，《博德之门3》将成为这个传奇系列的正式全新篇章。

《博德之门3》将撼动RPG的上限，玩家在其中可以体验无与伦比的自由度，经历由该游戏带来的丰富故事线，同时作出高风险的决策，与独特的伙伴同游，并进行无数次难忘的战斗。这是拉瑞安工作室有史以来最大规模的作品，玩家可以和朋友们一同游玩，也能够以单人模式开始冒险。

召集你的团队，回到被遗忘的国度，开启一段记载着友谊与背叛、牺牲与生存、以及至上力量诱惑的传奇故事。

神秘的力量正在你体内苏醒，而这一切都来源于夺心魔种在你大脑里的寄生虫。反抗吧，以黑暗的力量对抗黑暗吧。你也可以选择接受这种腐化，去成为终极的邪恶。

来自《神界：原罪2》的创作团队所打造的次时代RPG，故事将在D&D（龙与地下城）的世界中展开。

An ancient evil has returned to Baldur's Gate, intent on devouring it from the inside out. The fate of Faerun lies in your hands. Alone, you may resist. But together, you can overcome.

The land of Faerûn is in turmoil. Refugees cross the wilds, fleeing the helltorn stronghold of Elturel. A vicious cult marches across the Sword Coast, uniting every race of monsters and men under the banner of a cryptic god they call the Absolute. Chaos strikes at Faerûn's foundations, and none may escape its talons. Not even you.

The grotesque nautiloid ship appears out of nowhere, blotting out the sun. Its writhing tentacles snatch you from where you stand. The mind flayers have come, imprisoning you on their ship, infecting you with their horrid parasite. You will become one of them.

By fate or fortune, you survive when the nautiloid crashes in the Sword Coast outlands. You set out for civilisation, desperate for a cure for the parasite festering in your brain, only to take centre stage in a conspiracy that runs as deep as the Nine Hells. New enemies await.

As for old foes... the shadows stir.
And all roads lead to the legendary city of Baldur's Gate.

title: 小丑牌
description:
Balatro是一款以扑克为灵感的魔幻建牌游戏，你将全情投入于打造强大的增效并取得巨大胜利。

无尽可能 易学难精

将有效的扑克手牌与独特的小丑牌相结合，打造不同的增效和策略。赢得足够的筹码，打破盲注的奸计，同时在游戏过程中揭示隐藏的奖励牌手和牌组。为了到达终极盲注、击败最终赌注并稳操胜券，你需要尽一切可能获取优势。

一场扑克风格的终极博弈之旅。
无尽可能 - 每一次抽牌、弃牌和小丑牌的出现都可能彻底改变你的游戏进程。
深度战役模式，包括8种不同难度，还有挑战、每日通关和自定义游戏模式。

localized_description.text: Balatro is a deck-building roguelite in which players construct poker hands to earn chips and overcome enemy blinds. The game features mechanics for enhancing a deck of playing cards, purchasing Jokers that modify hand effects, and discovering synergies to progress through increasingly challenging encounters.

For over two decades, Counter-Strike has offered an elite competitive experience, one shaped by millions of players from across the globe. And now the next chapter in the CS story is about to begin. This is Counter-Strike 2.

A free upgrade to CS:GO, Counter-Strike 2 marks the largest technical leap in Counter-Strike’s history. Built on the Source 2 engine, Counter-Strike 2 is modernized with realistic physically-based rendering, state of the art networking, and upgraded Community Workshop tools.

title: 巴巴是你
description: Baba Is You is a puzzle game where the rules you have to follow are present as blocks you can interact with. By manipulating them, you can change how the game works, repurpose things you find in the levels and cause surprising interactions!

localized_description.text: Baba Is You is a puzzle game where the rules you have to follow are present as blocks you can interact with. By manipulating them, you can change how the game works, repurpose things you find in the levels and cause surprising interactions!
於2019發行的遊戲
2019 video game
videojuego de lógica de 2019
jeu vidéo de réflexion sorti en 2019
Computerspiel aus dem Jahr 2019
jogo eletrônico de 2019

Baba Is You is a puzzle game where you can change the rules by which you play. In every level, the rules themselves are present as blocks you can interact with; by manipulating them, you can change how the level works and cause surprising, unexpected interactions! With some simple block-pushing you can turn yourself into a rock, turn patches of grass into dangerously hot obstacles, and even change the goal you need to reach to something entirely different.

Baba Is You is an award-winning puzzle game where you can change the rules by which you play. In every level, the rules themselves are present as blocks you can interact with; by manipulating them, you can change how the level works and cause surprising, unexpected interactions! With some simple block-pushing you can turn yourself into a rock, turn patches of grass into dangerously hot obstacles, and even change the goal you need to reach to something entirely different.
 
    
 
 The game has over 200 levels that experiment with the game's mechanics in a multitude of ways, requiring the player to understand and manipulate the rules of the game and figure out devious ways to make the objects in the game world interact.
 
    
 
 The game was originally created for and won the Nordic Game Jam 2017. Baba Is You also won the Excellence in Design and Best Student Game awards in the Independent Games Festival 2018, and was nominated a finalist in 2 other categories, including the Seumas McNally Grand Prize. The game was made using Multimedia Fusion 2 by Clickteam.

Baba Is You es un galardonado juego de puzles en el que puedes cambiar las reglas de la partida. En cada nivel, las propias reglas están presentes en forma de bloques con los que puedes interaccionar. Al manipularlos, cambiarás el funcionamiento del nivel y se producirán todo tipo de interacciones inesperadas y sorprendentes. Basta empujar unos bloques para convertirte en una roca, transformar un prado de hierba en un peligroso obstáculo de lava e incluso cambiar el objetivo del nivel por otro totalmente distinto.
 
    
 
 El juego contiene más de 200 niveles que experimentan con las mecánicas de juego de maneras muy diversas. El jugador debe comprender y manipular las reglas hasta dar con algún metodo retorcido para que los objetos del nivel interactúen entre sí.
 
    
 
 El juego se creó originalmente para Nordic Game Jam 2017, donde resultó victorioso. Baba Is You también ha ganado los premios a Excelencia en el Diseño y Mejor Juego de un Estudiante en el Independent Game Festival de 2018 y recibió una nominación como finalista en otras dos categorías, incluído el Gran Premio Seumas McNally. Este juego se creó mediante la herramienta Multimedia Fusion 2 de Clickteam.

Baba Is You est un jeu de réflexion primé dans lequel vous pouvez changer les règles du jeu lui-même. Dans chaque niveau, les règles se présentent sous forme de blocs amovibles : les manipuler altère le fonctionnement du niveau et provoque des interactions inattendues ! Une simple poussée sur un bloc peut vous transformer en rocher, changer des mottes d'herbe en obstacles brûlants et même métamorphoser l’objectif à atteindre.
 
    
 
 Plus de 200 niveaux sont à votre disposition pour expérimenter sur les mécaniques de jeu d'une multitude de façons. Il vous faudra comprendre et manipuler les règles du jeu, ainsi qu’inventer des manières détournées de faire réagir les objets !
 
    
 
 Baba is You a été créé à l’occasion de Nordic Game Jam 2017, prix qu’il a remporté. Il a également gagné le prix Excellence in Design et le prix Best Student Game lors de l’Independent Games Festival 2018, et a été finaliste dans deux autres catégories, dont le Seumas McNally Grand Prize. Ce jeu a été réalisé avec Multimedia Fusion 2 de Clickteam.

Baba Is You In ist ein Award-ausgezeichnetes Puzzlespiel, in dem du die Regeln ändern kannst, nach denen gespielt wird. Die Regeln sind in jedem Level interaktive Befehlsblöcke; durch Änderungen kannst du beeinflussen, was passiert und überraschend unerwartete Kettenreaktionen auslösen! Durch einfaches blockverschieben kannst du dich selbst in einen Stein, Grasteppiche in kochendheiße Lava und sogar das zu erreichende Ziel in etwas völlig anderes verwandeln.
 
    
 
 Das Spiel besteht aus über 200 Leveln, die das Syntaxprinzip auf verschiedene Weisen anwenden und den Spieler dazu herausfordern, die Regeln zu verstehen, zu verändern und alle Wege herauszufinden, nach denen die Objekte im Spiel miteinander interagieren.
 
    
 
 Entwickelt wurde das Spiel ursprünglich für den Nordic Game Jam 2017. Baba Is You gewann ebenfalls den "Ausgezeichnetes Design" sowie "Bestes Studentenspiel"-Preis des Independent Game Festivals 2018 und wurde als Finalist für zwei weiteren Kategorien nominiert, einschliesslich dem Seumas McNally Grand Prize. Das Spiel wurde mit Multimedia Fusion 2 von Clickteam erstellt.

Baba Is You é um jogo de quebra-cabeças premiado onde você pode mudar as regras pelas quais você joga. Em todos os níveis, as próprias regras estão presentes como blocos com os quais você pode interagir; ao manipulá-los, você pode mudar a forma como o nível funciona e provocar interações surpreendentes e inesperadas! Com um simples empurrão de um bloco, você pode se transformar em uma rocha, transformar trechos de grama em obstáculos perigosamente quentes e até mesmo mudar o objetivo que você precisa para alcançar algo totalmente diferente.
 
    
 
 O jogo tem mais de 200 níveis que experimentam com as mecânicas do jogo de várias maneiras, exigindo que o jogador entenda e manipule as regras do jogo e descubra formas desonestas para fazer os objetos no mundo do jogo interagirem.
 
    
 
 O jogo foi originalmente criado para a Nordic Game Jam 2017 e ganhou. Baba Is You também ganhou os prêmios de Excelência em Design e Melhor Jogo Estudantil no Independent Games Festival 2018, e foi nomeado finalista em duas outras categorias, incluindo o Seumas McNally Grand Prêmio. O jogo foi feito usando o Multimedia Fusion 2 da Clickteam.

Baba Is You is an award-winning puzzle game where you can change the rules by which you play. In every level, the rules themselves are present as blocks you can interact with; by manipulating them, you can change how the level works and cause surprising, unexpected interactions! With some simple block-pushing you can turn yourself into a rock, turn patches of grass into dangerously hot obstacles, and even change the goal you need to reach to something entirely different.
 
    
 
 The game has over 200 levels that experiment with the game's mechanics in a multitude of ways, requiring the player to understand and manipulate the rules of the game and figure out devious ways to make the objects in the game world interact.
 
    
 
 The game was originally created for and won the Nordic Game Jam 2017. Baba Is You also won the Excellence in Design and Best Student Game awards in the Independent Games Festival 2018, and was nominated a finalist in 2 other categories, including the Seumas McNally Grand Prize. The game was made using Multimedia Fusion 2 by Clickteam.

Baba Is You è un videogioco rompicapo pluripremiato che ti dà la possibilità di cambiare le regole con cui giocherai. Esse sono presenti in ciascun livello sotto forma di blocchi interagibili: manipolandoli, cambierai il funzionamento del livello provocando delle interazioni sorprendenti e inaspettate! Basta spingere i blocchi per trasformarti in una roccia, tramutare delle chiazze d'erba in ostacoli pericolosamente caldi e persino cambiare l'obiettivo che devi raggiungere in qualcosa di completamente diverso.
 
    
 
 Baba Is You contiene più di 200 livelli che consentono di sperimentare in molteplici modi le meccaniche di gioco. È necessario che il giocatore comprenda e manipoli le regole e che trovi modalità alternative per far sì che gli oggetti presenti nel mondo di gioco interagiscano.
 
    
 
 Baba Is You è stato originariamente creato per la Nordic Game Jam 2017, vincendola. Si è inoltre aggiudicato i premi "Excellence in Design" e "Best Student Game" nell'Independent Games Festival 2018 ed è stato nominato finalista in altre due categorie, tra cui il Seumas McNally Grand Prize. Il videogioco è stato realizzato usando Multimedia Fusion 2 di Clickteam.

brief: Baba Is You is a puzzle game where the rules you have to follow are present as blocks you can interact with. By manipulating them, you can change how the game works, repurpose things you find in the levels and cause surprising interactions!

title: 鲁特里一家死了
description:
1998年，鲁特里集团的一架私人飞机坠毁。机上载有鲁特里三姐妹与她们的父母。据统计，罹难者的总资产超过十亿美元。
  根据高祖父伊莱亚斯制定的特殊遗嘱，这笔巨额财富必须重新分配给家族其他成员。但谁才是真正的血亲？这就是你需要解决的问题。
  仅凭借你的强力工具——拨号调制解调器的力量，你将搜寻照片、书籍、文章和其他证据。然后根据发现的亲属关系进行关联推理。每在家族树上正确填入一个位置，你手中剩余的名字和照片可放置的位置就越少——但证据也会愈发难以寻找且会更加隐晦。
  你能够拼凑出最后的真相吗？
  
   备受赞誉的“安乐椅神探”解谜游戏，现已在Steam平台全新登场 
  《鲁特里一家死了》最初于2023年全球游戏创作节（Global Game Jam）完成制作，作为免费浏览器游戏发布。该游戏凭借其巧妙的谜题设计、复古计算机界面和新颖的世界观构建赢得了众多玩家的喜爱。Steam版本在保留原版设计的同时进行了多方优化升级：
    使用手绘插画，出自知名桌游艺术家Henning Ludvigsen。
    采用3D客厅视角，巧妙融合所有独特谜题系统。
    优化用户界面，加入多项人性化改进，使解谜过程更加易于上手，操作更为直观。
    重新制作了音乐与音效，搭配全语音的过场动画。
    内含多处彩蛋与细节设计，献给那些沉醉于90年代末独特魅力的玩家。
    
   包含"鲁特里狂热"，一个全新的谜团 
    了解鲁特里家族在主线剧情后的命运走向。
    一个全新的族谱树等待你来完成！
    揭露美国最大枫糖帝国背后发生的丑闻、谎言与不忠事件。

localized_description.text: A genealogical mystery straight out of 1998. Scour the early Internet for clues, uncover hidden connections, and piece together the family tree behind the secretive Roottree Corporation.

1998年，鲁特里集团的一架私人飞机坠毁。机上载有鲁特里三姐妹与她们的父母。据统计，罹难者的总资产超过十亿美元。
  根据高祖父伊莱亚斯制定的特殊遗嘱，这笔巨额财富必须重新分配给家族其他成员。但谁才是真正的血亲？这就是你需要解决的问题。
  仅凭借你的强力工具——拨号调制解调器的力量，你将搜寻照片、书籍、文章和其他证据。然后根据发现的亲属关系进行关联推理。每在家族树上正确填入一个位置，你手中剩余的名字和照片可放置的位置就越少——但证据也会愈发难以寻找且会更加隐晦。
  你能够拼凑出最后的真相吗？
  
   备受赞誉的“安乐椅神探”解谜游戏，现已在Steam平台全新登场 
  《鲁特里一家死了》最初于2023年全球游戏创作节（Global Game Jam）完成制作，作为免费浏览器游戏发布。该游戏凭借其巧妙的谜题设计、复古计算机界面和新颖的世界观构建赢得了众多玩家的喜爱。Steam版本在保留原版设计的同时进行了多方优化升级：
